nodes.label: AI as writing revision collaborator
nodes.grounding_span: AI tends to make endless corrections even when they aren't improvements

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming assistant for generic commercial work
nodes.label_negative: AI as incapable of artful design
nodes.grounding_span: If it's generic commercial work, then sure, I'll use it for brainstorming. If it's illustrative or something more artful, I will never delegate to AI

nodes.label: Human-made creative work valued for soul and personality
nodes.grounding_span: You can always feel the soul in work that's human made. AI can never replicate that

nodes.label: AI as efficient professional writing critic
nodes.label_negative: AI as provider of cringy generic ideas
nodes.grounding_span: It's really great at professional writing... It significantly slims the time it takes to get from a rough draft to a polished final

nodes.label: Open AI use at work
nodes.label_negative: Private AI use due to stigma
nodes.grounding_span: People used to use it openly, now it's more private

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: I value work that is human made

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency in writing
nodes.grounding_span: It significantly slims the time it takes to get from a rough draft to a polished final

nodes.label: Professional reputation and social acceptance
nodes.grounding_span: The stigma surrounding AI is becoming more prominent

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for writing critique
nodes.grounding_span: It helps immensely with writing critique

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for bad ideas
nodes.grounding_span: AI has frustrated me when it offers bad ideas

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in artful design
nodes.grounding_span: I will never delegate to AI

nodes.label: Openness to AI for generic commercial brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: If it's generic commercial work, then sure, I'll use it for brainstorming

nodes.label: Adaptation to stigma by using AI privately
nodes.grounding_span: People used to use it openly, now it's more private

nodes.label: Iterative collaborative refinement — back-and-forth editing with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I send drafts back and forth with AI, I edit their revised version of my draft, ask for feedback

nodes.label: Domain-based task segregation — clear boundary between commercial and artful work
nodes.grounding_span: If it's generic commercial work, then sure, I'll use it for brainstorming. If it's illustrative or something more artful, I will never delegate to AI
